description: Dependency validation rules for Wildlife Watcher Expo SDK 51 Migration

expo.reason: PRD specifies 51.0.0 but 51.0.39 is a compatible patch version

react-native.reason: PRD requirement - must match exactly for override compatibility

react-native-ble-manager.reason: Native module - will be installed in Phase 2

react-native-bluetooth-state-manager.reason: Native module - will be installed in Phase 2

react-native-reanimated.reason: Required by Expo SDK 51 and also supported by React Native 0.74

expo-dev-client.reason: Expo development client for managed workflow - migrated from bare React Native

react-native-maps.reason: Matches WW app version exactly for migration validation

@reduxjs/toolkit.reason: Redux state management from WW app architecture

react-redux.reason: Redux bindings from WW app architecture

@react-navigation/native.reason: Navigation foundation from WW app architecture

@react-navigation/bottom-tabs.reason: Tab navigation from WW app architecture

@react-navigation/drawer.reason: Drawer navigation from WW app architecture

@react-navigation/native-stack.reason: Stack navigation from WW app architecture

react-native-paper.reason: Material Design components from WW app

expo-file-system.reason: File system operations - migrated from react-native-fs

expo-constants.reason: Environment variable access - migrated from react-native-config

expo-localization.reason: Localization support - installed during Expo setup

expo-splash-screen.reason: Splash screen management - migrated from react-native-bootsplash

react-native-vector-icons.reason: Use @expo/vector-icons instead for Expo managed workflow

@react-native-community/netinfo.reason: Use expo-network instead for Expo managed workflow

react-native-linear-gradient.reason: Use expo-linear-gradient instead for Expo managed workflow

react-native-fs.reason: Migrated to expo-file-system for Expo managed workflow

react-native-config.reason: Migrated to expo-constants for environment variables

react-native-bootsplash.reason: Migrated to expo-splash-screen for Expo managed workflow
